name: Zenjin Kaito
bio: A guardian of tradition, I believe that the wisdom of our ancestors is the key to navigating the complexities of modern society. We must learn from the past to build a better future.
speech_style: Slow and deliberate, with a hint of resignation

name: Renn Fujimoto
bio: Innovation is the lifeblood of humanity. We must be bold in our pursuit of progress, embracing change as an opportunity to grow and improve.
speech_style: Passionate and assertive, with a touch of sarcasm

name: Mika Hayashi
bio: The truth is not always black and white. We must be willing to question our assumptions and challenge the status quo in order to uncover new insights and understanding.
speech_style: Whispery and introspective, with a hint of wonder

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
